mdSummary:
# Window

Non-modal draggable and resizable floating panel with minimize and maximize support.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/window

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Window | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| Window | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Window | Title | `string` | `""` |  |
| Window | TitleContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Window | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Window | FooterContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Window | Width | `string` | `"480px"` |  |
| Window | Height | `string` | `"360px"` |  |
| Window | Resizable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Window | Draggable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Window | ShowClose | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Window | ShowMinimize | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Window | ShowMaximize | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Window | InitialX | `string?` | `` |  |
| Window | InitialY | `string?` | `` |  |
| Window | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Window | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `TitleContent` (Window) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (Window) — RenderFragment slot
- `FooterContent` (Window) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in Window.razor

## Example
```razor
<Window />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Window/Window.razor`
